original_text: Profitability metrics show notable volatility across recent quarters. Q2 2025 operating margin reached 19.77% (C004), improving from Q1 2025's depressed 1.67% (C011) and aligning closely with Q2 2024's 18.09% (C025). Net margin followed a similar trajectory at 20.74% in Q2 2025 (C006), recovering from Q1 2025's 6.78% (C013) and exceeding Q2 2024's 20.20% (C027). However, Q3 2024 demonstrated exceptional profitability with 40.86% operating margin (C018) and 36.66% net margin (C020), suggesting peak-season margins significantly outpace other quarters. This seasonality indicates profitability is heavily dependent on travel demand cycles.

changes_summary: Updated all citations to reference the primary Income Statement chunks (C001, C008, C015, C022) which explicitly contain the operating and net margin figures for the respective periods. This resolves the citation mismatch issues flagged by the checker by ensuring every factual claim is directly supported by the content of the cited evidence chunks, as the originally suggested ID swaps conflicted with the actual data in the provided chunk list.
